name: io.github.dearlordylord/obs-mcp
title: OBS MCP
description: MCP server for OBS Studio websocket automation

environmentVariables.name: OBS_WEBSOCKET_URL
environmentVariables.description: OBS websocket URL. Omit to use ws://localhost:4455.

environmentVariables.name: OBS_WEBSOCKET_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: OBS websocket password, when authentication is enabled.

environmentVariables.name: OBS_WEBSOCKET_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Connection and request timeout in milliseconds. Omit to use the package default.

environmentVariables.name: TOOLSETS
environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated toolset filter. The initial supported toolset is scenes.
